name: Parameter Golf SOTA
techniques: Exclusive Self Attention (XSA) on last 4 layers
Partial RoPE (16/64 head dims) for position-invariant pattern learning
LN Scale 1/sqrt(layer+1) for deep layer stabilization
Tight SWA every 50 steps from 50% of training
GPTQ-lite INT6 per-row optimal clip percentile search (6 candidates)
Legal Score-First Test-Time Training (TTT, 3 epochs, cosine LR)
Muon optimizer (parallel Newton-Schulz, WD=0.04) for weight matrices
Tied embeddings with separate learnable scale
INT6 QAT with straight-through estimator from 15% of training
Warmdown cosine LR decay over 3500 steps
Muon momentum warmup from 0.92 to 0.99 over 1500 steps
description: Full SOTA stack: 11L U-Net + LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + XSA + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + EMA + VE128 + GPTQ-lite + Legal TTT
